payload.answer: Saved a minimal memory capturing the provided URL, the requested rationale ('useful for memory architecture'), and the mocked fetch failure (404 network error).

entity_resolution.reason: The only stable identifier provided is the URL; no authoritative article metadata could be fetched.

payload.intent: Remember a referenced article URL and the reason it was requested, noting that the fetch failed.

memory_cards.statement: The URL https://example.com/missing was provided for an article to remember, but a mocked fetch result returned a 404 network error.
The user’s stated reason for the (unretrieved) article reference was 'useful for memory architecture'. The article content could not be verified due to the fetch failure.

details: Stored fetch failure and user rationale without attempting to save unverified article content.

repair_options: Provide an alternate working URL for the article.
Provide cached text or a summary of the article content to store.
Confirm whether the intended URL differs from https://example.com/missing.
